name: Ventia Services Group Limited
analysis: VNT's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 4% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.1× the 20-day average) — real participation. Trade idea: entry A$6.5550, stop A$6.1578, target A$7.7466 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
